symptom: read-spiral loop_guard detection at iter 19 but the spiral started at iter 6. Generic HARD_LOOP_THRESHOLD=3 gave the drone 3 identical file_read attempts before intervening; for scaffold-first gamedev where file_read is structurally pointless, 3 is too generous.
root_cause: HARD_LOOP_THRESHOLD is a global constant; no per-mode override. Scaffold-first gamedev inlines every file the drone needs, so 2 identical file_reads is already enough signal.
fix_approach: add HARD_LOOP_THRESHOLD_SCAFFOLD_FIRST_READ=2; loop_guard.check fires on 2 identical file_read calls when _scaffold_kind==gamedev AND _gamedev_mode==scaffold_first
fix_location: tsunami/loop_guard.py::check — new early branch before the generic hard-loop check
principle: v5 — thresholds should match the domain. Generic constants waste iterations in cases where the structural answer is always no.

desc: scaffold-first gamedev — 2 identical file_reads on data/enemies.json fires hard loop
scaffold-first gamedev — 1 file_read does NOT fire
legacy gamedev (not scaffold_first) — 2 identical file_reads does NOT fire early (generic threshold 3 applies)
plain react-app — 2 identical file_reads does NOT fire (web-app drones legitimately re-read after state changes)
scaffold-first gamedev — 2 identical file_WRITEs does NOT fire (file_write is legitimate, even identical in rapid succession — drone may retry after is_error)
scaffold-first gamedev — file_read interrupted by file_write — does NOT fire (streak broken)
scaffold-first gamedev — 3 identical file_reads still triggers (generic hard loop catches what the scaffold-first branch would have)
